nodes.label: Macro Window Positioning
nodes.source_file: references/sources/articles/2026-05-08 100438_冰冰小美_这个路径明白后，那么根据宏观窗口，即48-514，接近514，突破新高，减仓到盈利持仓。那么立于不败之地。.md
nodes.author: 冰冰小美
nodes.rationale: Treat approaching the 5/14 macro window after a new high as a reason to reduce exposure to profitable holdings.
